ddls:
CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the query */,
  "text" TEXT /* User input text */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the query */,
  "intent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the identified intent */,
  "slots_id" INTEGER /* ID of the extracted slots */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the intent prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_slots_id FOREIGN KEY ("slots_id") REFERENCES slots ("slots_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_intent_id FOREIGN KEY ("intent_id") REFERENCES intents ("intent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intents" (
  "intent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intent */,
  "intent_name" TEXT /* Name of the intent (e.g., atis_flight, atis_flight_time) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intent */,
  "intent_type" TEXT /* Type of the intent (e.g., flight, booking, cancellation) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "slots" (
  "slots_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each slot */,
  "slot_name" TEXT /* Name of the slot (e.g., fromloc.city_name, toloc.city_name) */,
  "slot_value" TEXT /* Value of the slot */,
  "slot_type" TEXT /* Type of the slot (e.g., location, date, time) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the slot extraction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("slots_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_slots_slot_value FOREIGN KEY ("slot_value") REFERENCES airports ("city_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Unique flight number */,
  "airline" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "fromloc.city_name" TEXT /* City of departure */,
  "toloc.city_name" TEXT /* City of arrival */,
  "from_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the departure airport */,
  "to_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the arrival airport */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the flight (e.g., on-time, delayed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_from_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_to_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* City name */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Unique airport code */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)
column_names: ID of the user who made the query
Confidence score of the intent prediction
Name of the intent (e.g., atis_flight, atis_flight_time)
Type of the intent (e.g., flight, booking, cancellation)
Name of the slot (e.g., fromloc.city_name, toloc.city_name)
Type of the slot (e.g., location, date, time)
Confidence score of the slot extraction
Status of the flight (e.g., on-time, delayed, cancelled)
